===================
===================
===================
=== BOB DYLAN 1976-04-27 Tallahassee, Florida (repair).txt
===================
===================
===================

BOB DYLAN and the
Rolling Thunder Revue - part II

Tully Gymnasium
Florida State University
Tallahassee, Florida


1. Mr. Tambourine Man (cut at start)
2. If You See Her, Say Hello
3. Vincent Van Gogh 

4. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight 
5. Maggie's Farm 
6. One Too Many Mornings (only 34 seconds before tape ends).


=====

- total time of this recording is just 21 mins 37 seconds
- that's it, this is all that has even been known to circulate from this concert
- Does anyone in Florida or surrounds know anything about any other tapes?
- a review of this show says that the capacity crowd of 3,900 were searched for recording gear and cameras on the way in and that any found were required to be confiscated.
- there was a bomb threat made towards the University before the show. Police searched and found nothing. 

======

1-2 Bob solo acoustic
3 with Bobby Neuwirth

======


audiowhore repair project - 1976
source used: LB-4309 (My Tape > Cooledit > NR & HR > CDR > EAC > Flac)


Notes about this recording:
- thanks to the taper for attempting to tape
- but, poor quality partial tape only
- pitch was too high and speed too fast by varying amounts for each track
- nothing from this show has been officially released
- another rewritten version of If You See Her, Say Hello.


What i have done:
- adjust pitch and speed for each song individually to correct
- fix SBEs
- eq mixing to better balance and clean up the sound
- some hard limit on loud clapping
- minor dropouts, microphone bumps cleaned/manually removed
- No noise or hiss reduction used by me.


Notes about other versions of this show:
- LB-3408 and LB-4309 are from the same source, but were processed differently.
- No other known source.
- LosslessBob grades these as D and C-.


========

Rolling Thunder Revue part II ensemble:

Bob Dylan
Rob Stoner (bass)
Scarlet Rivera (violin)
T-bone J. Henry Burnette (guitar & piano)
Steven Soles (guitar)
Mick Ronson (guitar)
Bobby Neuwirth (guitar & vocal)
Roger McGuinn (guitar & vocal)
David Mansfield (steel guitar, mandolin, violin & dobro)
Howie Wyeth (drums)
Gary Burke (congas).

========

If you have enjoyed hearing this repaired version of Tallahassee 1976, it is one of many shows that I have repaired and am continuing to work on.
I will keep sharing these on Dime if the following requests are respected:
- Do not post this audio on youtube
- Do not repost anywhere in mp3 or degraded sound quality (youtube can be worse resolution than mp3!)
- Please don't post on other sites, in particular i am requesting that it not go on the Expecting Rain (ER) message board
- Not for sale or profit.

========

Thanks to: the taper (please contact me of you're out there), Les Kokay and his 'Songs of the Underground' publication, LosslessBob, Dylanchords.com, and my Cambridge friends.

========

First posted to Dime on the 45th anniversary of this concert.
===================
===================
===================
=== ORIGINAL Notes.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/27/76, Tallahassee, Florida, Florida State University, 1CDR

My Tape > Cooledit > NR & HR > CDR > EAC > Flac

1 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) 
2 If You See Her, Say Hello (acoustic) 
3 Vincent van Gogh 
4 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight 
5 Maggie's Farm 
6 One Too Many Mornings
